item.title: Keeping the Sweet Corn Patch Safe
item.description: Laura Farms checks on the sweet corn patch and works to keep it safe. A simple farm moment focused on care, attention, and daily life in the field.

media:content.media:title: Keeping the Sweet Corn Patch Safe
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms checks on the sweet corn patch and works to keep it safe. A simple farm moment focused on care, attention, and daily life in the field.

item.title: Making the Field Smooth Again
item.description: Laura Farms gets the field smoothed out again, showing the steady work that goes into keeping things ready on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Making the Field Smooth Again
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms gets the field smoothed out again, showing the steady work that goes into keeping things ready on the farm.

item.title: The Daredevil Of Farming
item.description: A look at farm life with a bold, determined spirit and the daily work that keeps things moving.

media:content.media:description: A look at farm life with a bold, determined spirit and the daily work that keeps things moving.

item.title: Checking Out a Monster Machine in the Fields
item.description: Out in the fields today with Laura Farms, checking out a monster machine and taking in the day’s work on the farm.

media:content.media:description: Out in the fields today with Laura Farms, checking out a monster machine and taking in the day’s work on the farm.

item.title: Inside a John Deere Cab on the Farm
item.description: A simple farm moment enjoying time inside a John Deere cab. A familiar part of daily work and life on the farm.

media:content.media:description: A simple farm moment enjoying time inside a John Deere cab. A familiar part of daily work and life on the farm.

item.title: High Winds and Dry Fields, Teamwork Wins
item.description: Laura Farms faces high winds and dry fields with teamwork and determination, showing the steady pace of farm life and the value of working together.

media:content.media:title: High Winds and Dry Fields, Teamwork Wins
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms faces high winds and dry fields with teamwork and determination, showing the steady pace of farm life and the value of working together.

item.title: Why Center Pivots Matter on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms looks at why center pivots can be both a help and a challenge in daily farm work.

media:content.media:title: Why Center Pivots Matter on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms looks at why center pivots can be both a help and a challenge in daily farm work.

item.title: Land Auctions: Rare Events With High Stakes
item.description: Laura Farms looks at land auctions and the big decisions they bring, sharing a practical farm-life moment with a clear, grounded perspective.

item.title: Laura Farms: A Powerful Machine in Action
item.description: Laura Farms shares a look at a powerful machine working hard on the farm, showing the daily grit and teamwork behind the job.

item.title: Testing the New Wood Splitter
item.description: Laura Farms tests the new wood splitter and shares a simple look at farm life and machinery in action.
